title: Trustpilot Company Details Scraper
description: Extract structured Trustpilot profile details for one or more company domains.

company_domain.title: Company Domain
company_domain.description: Single company domain with or without protocol, for example trustpilot.com or https://www.trustpilot.com.

company_domains.title: Company Domains
company_domains.description: Batch of company domains to process in one run. Each domain produces one dataset item.

locale.title: Locale
locale.description: Trustpilot locale used for the company profile page.

fields.title: Fields
fields.description: Optional comma-separated Scrappa response fields to include if projection is enabled for this endpoint later, such as basic_info, ratings, categories, contact, social_media, and metadata.
